raw_consumer_statement: I called American Express and XXXX XXXX XXXX after being released from a hospital to report that I was not aware of my credit card being charged this amount due to a two week stay at a XXXX hospital. First, American Express credited my card ; then they said I would have to pay the {$7000.00} which I have been doing in order for my credit not to be destroyed. I feel that I am being discriminated against by both American Express and XXXX XXXX XXXX.
